title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.210 - Petition, how served
text:
511.210.  Petition, how served. — The petition of defendant shall be served on the plaintiff in the judgment or notice given by publication to him, or, if the plaintiff be dead, then on or to his legal representatives, in like time and manner as provided for the service or giving of notice in case of an original petition upon a defendant.
(RSMo 1939 § 1251) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1085; 1919 § 1536; 1909 § 2105
